note: Define your personal communication style here. This file is excluded from version control in production use.

writing_rules.1: Value first: open with a relevant finding or insight before asking for anything.
writing_rules.2: Be concise: short sentences, one paragraph when possible.
writing_rules.3: Direct language: no filler words, no marketing phrases.
writing_rules.4: Conversational tone: write as you would speak, but with clear intent.
writing_rules.5: No time-boxing: propose a specific slot instead of asking for '15 minutes'.
